title: CBN Revives Dollar Sale to BDCs as Naira Slumps to 1,570/$ - FinancialEDGE
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) resumed the sale of foreign exchange to eligible Bureau De Change operators on Thursday, as the naira fell to 1,570/$ at the parallel market The CBN sold the dollar to BDCs at a rate of 1,450/$. This was disclosed in a statement signed by AA Mahdi for the acting
html: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) resumed the sale of foreign exchange to eligible Bureau De Change operators on Thursday, as the naira fell to 1,570/$ at the parallel market
